dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 8953 IH: Preserving Community Food Assistance Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Yakym introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Agriculture

form.official-title: To amend the Food Emergency Assistance Act of 1983 to restore choice to community food assistance providers to request identification, at their discretion, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Preserving Community Food Assistance Act of 2026.

Section 202A(b)(4) of the Emergency Food Assistance Act of 1983 (7 U.S.C. 7503(b)(4)) is amended by inserting (at the option of the State agency based on documented proof of residency such as a photo identification card, a piece of mail, residency documentation, or other similar document) after residing.
